title: Realtime Presence
description: A presence record describing a member's membership in a realtime channel — who is connected, with what client metadata, and from when. Generalizes the presence models in Ably, Pusher, PubNub, Phoenix Presence, and LiveKit room participants.

channel.description: Channel on which the presence event occurred.

clientId.description: Identifier of the user or client whose presence is being reported.

connectionId.description: Provider-assigned identifier for the transport connection backing this presence.

action.description: The presence transition this record represents.

data.description: Application-defined presence metadata associated with the member (e.g., display name, avatar URL, status, location).

since.description: Time at which the member entered the channel (only for 'present'/'update').
